query:
SELECT ws.tenantId, ws.pushName as ownerName, ws.phoneNumber as ownerPhone,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wa_conversations wc WHERE wc.sessionId = ws.sessionId AND wc.contactPushName = ws.pushName) as conversations_with_owner_name,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wa_conversations wc WHERE wc.sessionId = ws.sessionId) as total_conversations
FROM whatsapp_sessions ws WHERE ws.status != 'deleted';
